---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What does the feature do?

A clear description of the feature or change.

## Why does it fit Everrealm?

How does this fit the design principles? (Screen-reader first, calm strategy,
meaningful decisions, no time pressure, etc.)

## How does it affect screen reader users?

Consider the impact on accessibility. Does it add new UI elements that need
aria labels? Does it change the keyboard flow?

## Additional context

Any other details, mockups, or references.
